concept: Editorial-v1 infographic wrapping the context-fragments fan-in diagram

wrappedText.headline: Four inputs feed Context Fragments which the Computation Box consumes
wrappedText.lede: Every model call assembles **context fragments** from the system prompt, callable surfaces, hook outputs, and recalled memory. The computation box consumes the assembled context.

captions.title: System prompt
captions.body: base instruction layer plus user-appended turn directives.

captions.title: Tools and hooks
captions.body: callable surfaces and pre/post intercepts add structured fragments.

captions.title: Recalled memory
captions.body: previously stored facts and traces re-enter as fragments.

captions.title: Computation
captions.body: the model performs a forward pass over the assembled context.
